recommendations.title: Contain budget overrun
recommendations.description: Review spend drivers for Project Alpha and align burn with the approved target.

rationale.business_rationale: Sustained overspend reduces runway and limits portfolio flexibility.

recommendations.title: Restore connector access
recommendations.description: Restore connector access for Project Alpha to improve briefing accuracy.

rationale.business_rationale: Failed connectors prevent reliable portfolio signals and executive reporting.

recommendations.title: Verify project status
recommendations.description: Verify project status and confirm development activity for Project Gamma.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: GitHub reported 0 commits in the last 14 days.

rationale.business_rationale: Two weeks without commits is a strong indicator of stalled delivery or incorrect tracking.

recommendations.title: Investigate cost spike
recommendations.description: Investigate the recent burn increase on Project Alpha and validate planned scope changes.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Monthly burn increased from 40000 to 55000 (37.5% change).

rationale.business_rationale: Sudden cost increases often indicate scope creep, staffing changes, or billing anomalies.

recommendations.title: Address velocity decline
recommendations.description: Review throughput on Project Alpha; commit volume dropped materially week-over-week.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Commits fell from 10 to 2 week-over-week (80.0% decrease).

rationale.business_rationale: Falling velocity can precede schedule slips if root causes are not identified early.

recommendations.title: Check delivery activity
recommendations.description: Confirm engineering activity on Project Gamma; no commits were recorded in the last 7 days.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: GitHub reported 0 commits in the last 7 days.

rationale.business_rationale: A week without commits may indicate blocked work, misconfigured repos, or paused delivery.

recommendations.title: Refresh connector data
recommendations.description: Refresh stale connector data for Project Alpha to restore timely portfolio visibility.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Last successful connector sync was 159.4 hours ago.

rationale.business_rationale: Outdated metrics increase the risk of decisions based on expired information.

recommendations.title: Validate delivery tracking
recommendations.description: Validate Jira activity for Project Alpha; no issue updates were recorded in the lookback window.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Jira reported 0 issue updates in the last 7 days.

rationale.business_rationale: Missing issue activity reduces visibility into in-flight work and blockers.

recommendations.title: Review unused capacity
recommendations.description: Review unused capacity and evaluate acceleration opportunities for Project Beta.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Monthly burn 12000 is below target 20000 by 40.0%.

rationale.business_rationale: Budget headroom may fund acceleration or support reallocation to higher-priority work.

recommendations.title: Assign project owner
recommendations.description: Assign an accountable owner to Project Gamma for budget and delivery oversight.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Project has no assigned owner field.

rationale.business_rationale: Unowned projects are harder to escalate and remediate across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Evaluate spare capacity
recommendations.description: Evaluate spare team and budget capacity on Project Beta for reallocation or acceleration.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Project is 40.0% under budget with team size 2.

rationale.business_rationale: Unused capacity represents an opportunity to shift resources toward strategic priorities.

recommendations.title: Scale proven delivery
recommendations.description: Consider expanding scope or sharing practices from Project Beta, which is under budget with strong activity.

supporting_metrics.signal_description: Project is 40.0% under budget with 8 commits in the last 7 days.

rationale.business_rationale: High-performing projects offer reusable patterns and potential capacity for strategic bets.
